saints.en: St. All-Praised Apostle Andrew the First-Called

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» - 8 стихир ап., Слава: ап., І нині: богородичний-догмат за гласом «Слава». Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання: 1 Пт. 1:1-25, 2:1-6, 1 Пт. 2:21-25, 3:1-9, 1 Пт. 4:1-11. Стиховня ціла ап., зі своїми приспівами. Тропар ап., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби ап.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар ап. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Катизми чергові з сідальними ап., також полієлей з величаннями і сідальний ап. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен ап. Єв. – Мт. 9 зач.; 4, 18-23. Стихира ап. Канон Богородиці і ап. Катавасія після кожної пісні – «Христос народжується». По 3-ій пісні – сідальний ап. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос ап. По 9-ій – світильний ап. Хвалитні стихири ап. – 4. Слава: ап., І нині: богород. за гласом наславника. По великому славослов'ї з трисвятим – тропар ап., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря ап. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби ап.
Часи: тропар і кондак ап.
Літургія: все – тільки ап. Апостол і євангелія спочатку – Ряд.: Ап. – 2 Тим. 294 зач.; 2, 20-26. Єв. – Лк. 97 зач.; 19, 37-44, а відтак Ап.: Ап. – 1 Кор. 131 зач.; 4, 9-16. Єв. – Ів. 4 зач.; 1, 35-51.

troparion_en.text: O Andrew, as the First-called of the Apostles  / and brother of their Leader,  /  entreat the Master of all  / to grant peace to the world  /  and to our souls great mercy.

kontakion_en.text:
(Podoben: “Neither the tomb, nor death could hold…” (Kontakion for the Dormition)
Let us praise Andrew, the divine preacher,  /  the namesake of courage,  /  the first-called of the Savior’s disciples  /  and the kinsman of Peter.  /  As he once called to his brother, now he cries out to us:  /  “Come, for we have found Him whom the world desires!”1

matched_oca_saint: Apostle Andrew, the Holy and All-Praised First-Called

troparion.text: O God of our Fathers, / always act with kindness towards us; / take not Your mercy from us, / but guide our lives in peace / through the prayers of Saints Sebastian and Mardarije.

kontakion.text: Apostle and Enlightener of America,  / born in San Francisco, first one born in America to become a priest.  / Fiery preacher of Christ’s Word among the peoples of America,  /  you traveled throughout the country preaching truth and love,  /  confirming many souls in the Orthodox Faith, and building many churches to the glory of God;  / poor in body but rich in the Spirit, O Father Sebastian of Jackson and Apostle of All America,  / entreat the Lord Whom you served with your whole heart,  / to grant us your last spoken wish: the everlasting Kingdom of Heaven.

oca_saints.name: Apostle Andrew, the Holy and All-Praised First-Called

troparion.text: O Andrew, as the First-called of the Apostles  / and brother of their Leader,  /  entreat the Master of all  / to grant peace to the world  /  and to our souls great mercy.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Neither the tomb, nor death could hold…” (Kontakion for the Dormition)
Let us praise Andrew, the divine preacher,  /  the namesake of courage,  /  the first-called of the Savior’s disciples  /  and the kinsman of Peter.  /  As he once called to his brother, now he cries out to us:  /  “Come, for we have found Him whom the world desires!”1

oca_saints.name: Saint Frumentius, Archbishop of Abyssinia, Ethiopia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Frumentius, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Entrance of the Apostle Andrew into Georgia

troparion.text: Andrew, first-called of the Apostles / and brother of the foremost disciple, / entreat the Master of all / to grant peace to the world / and to our souls great mercy.

kontakion.text: Let us praise Andrew, the herald of God, / the namesake of courage, / the first-called of the Savior’s disciples / and the brother of Peter. / As he once called to his brother, he now cries out to us: / “Come, for we have found the One whom the world desires!”

oca_saints.name: Hierarch Peter, first Catholicos of Georgia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Peter, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Hierarch Samuel, Second Catholicos of Georgia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Samuel, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.
